title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: Updated ubi9 container image
overview: An update for Updated is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.
description: The ubi9 container image is designed and engineered to be used by other Red Hat products. This image is only supported for approved Red Hat products. This image is maintained by Red Hat and updated regularly.
affected_products: Red Hat Enterprise Linux for IBM z Systems
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for Power, little endian
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for ARM 64
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for x86_64 10 x86_64
full_text:
An update for Updated is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

The ubi9 container image is designed and engineered to be used by other Red Hat products. This image is only supported for approved Red Hat products. This image is maintained by Red Hat and updated regularly.
